detail: PACE, ROB, and sales productivity — each dashboard killed a recurring manual ritual. Revenue leadership now runs on live intelligence, not one-off pulls.
Co-led the FY2026–27 annual operating plan. Data migration, source-segment validation, GL code alignment. Planning timelines stayed on track.
Cost allocation framework for a contract manufacturer. For the first time, leadership could see which SKUs actually made money.
Power BI dashboard with cross-functional teams. Automated what used to be a manual monthly ritual. The team spent that time on analysis instead.
Streamlined financial reporting for an FMCG client. Less time closing the books meant more time understanding what the numbers said.
Google Apps Script automation on the shop floor. Wrote the code, trained the team, watched the repetitive work disappear. 1,000+ users affected.
